gates.name: map
gates.criterion: Every functional requirement is mapped or explicitly deferred.

gates.name: sketch
gates.criterion: All producer and consumer interfaces are mutually consistent.

gates.name: decide
gates.criterion: One implementation is selected per module with zero interface conflicts.

gates.name: prototype
gates.criterion: The dependency-ordered build sequence is a valid topological sort.

gates.name: test
gates.criterion: The founding hypothesis has a complete pass/fail measurement.

invalidation_reason: PRD validation strategy changed from simulated/live interview evidence to a documentary problem-evidence gate followed by concierge, blinded rewrite, and observed real-user product-demand tests. Regeneration requires user confirmation after all PRD validation thresholds pass.
